name: 07-01-side-by-side-diff-linked-horizontal-scroll
title: Side-by-side diff linked horizontal scroll
description: Improve side-by-side diff view so each pane has its own horizontal scrollbar and horizontal scrolling is linked between panes, matching IDE-style interaction.
creator: lichong
notes: Implemented IDE-style side-by-side diff panes with independent scroll containers and linked scroll synchronization. Unified diff mode remains unchanged.
